required_pre_delete_checks: Re-run df/du immediately before deletion to confirm target still matters and is on expected filesystem.
Re-run docker ps/inspect and confirm target is not a source/bind mount and is not under any Docker named volume mountpoint.
Re-run ps/lsof/fuser or equivalent and confirm no active process references target.
Confirm target is not a DB, DB dump, secret, env file, credential, mounted path, live runtime source, or current workspace artifact path.
For git/worktree paths, run git status, git remote -v with secrets redacted, git worktree list, and capture/commit/export any unique dirty or untracked work before deletion.
For caches, prefer tool-native prune/cache-clean commands over rm when available and accept that tools may re-download artifacts.
Record operator approval and receipt path before deletion in a later phase.

explicit_not_candidates.reason: database dump excluded by task rule
Docker volumes excluded by task rule
local Ollama model store; active ML/runtime dependency, not a cleanup target without separate model-retention review
Hermes profile state; durable agent state, not a deletion target

notes: Manifest is a review queue, not an approval to delete.
All Docker named volumes are excluded by rule even when docker system df reports them reclaimable.
Docker build cache is visible as reclaimable in docker system df but is intentionally not converted into a path deletion candidate; use Docker-native prune only in a later approved phase.
